## Verification Report: 0165-rewrite-find-root-to-use

| # | Criterion | Result | Evidence |
|---|-----------|--------|----------|
| 1 | `find_root()` from main repo root returns main repo | ✅ PASS | `test_finds_openstation_dir` + `test_finds_source_repo` confirm; toplevel→check_dir at lines 137-144 |
| 2 | `find_root()` from subdirectory returns main repo root | ✅ PASS | `test_finds_openstation_from_subdirectory` covers deep/nested subdir case |
| 3 | Worktree WITHOUT `.openstation/` → main repo (attached) | ✅ PASS | `test_finds_vault_from_worktree` + subdirectory variant confirm; fallback at lines 147-152 |
| 4 | Worktree WITH `.openstation/` → worktree root (independent) | ✅ PASS | `test_worktree_with_own_markers_returns_worktree` confirms; toplevel check returns before main fallback |
| 5 | Non-git directory → `(None, None)` | ✅ PASS | Two tests: bare non-git dir + non-git with markers both return `(None, None)` |
| 6 | `_walk_up()` is removed | ✅ PASS | Grep across entire repo: zero matches in source code |
| 7 | All existing tests pass or are updated | ✅ PASS | 11 tests rewritten covering main repo, attached worktree, independent worktree, non-git, and graceful degradation |

**All 7 items pass.** Task transitioned to `verified`.

Run `/openstation.done 0165-rewrite-find-root-to-use` when ready to complete the task.
